---
name: Improvement
about: Suggest an improvement to existing DealRoom behavior
title: "[Improvement]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary
A 1-2 sentence description of what needs to be improved and why.

## Current Behavior
Describe how it works today (what is lacking or frustrating).

## Proposed Improvement
Describe the expected behavior after the improvement is applied.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] [Given ... When ... Then ...]
- [ ] [Criterion 2]
- [ ] [Criterion 3]

## Out of Scope
List anything explicitly NOT included in this improvement.

## Additional Notes
References, related issues, mockups, or supporting data.
